positive: A stylized, symmetrical geometric design featuring a whimsical forest scene silhouette. The main subject is a collection of stylized pine trees, flowing river curves, and large stylized flora (mushrooms, ferns). The style should be vector art mixed with modern linocut engraving aesthetic. Use a limited, natural color palette of deep forest green, rich teal, terracotta orange, and cream white for high contrast. The composition must be circular and perfectly balanced for a central apparel print. The overall mood is playful and ethereal. Clean lines, high detail, perfect symmetry, isolated on white background.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, signature, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, messy, cluttered, photorealistic, complex gradient, gradient wash
